description_long: This is an electric guitar with a contoured, double-cutaway body finished in a glossy blue color with a white pickguard. The front features three black control knobs and three single-coil pickups, typical of a Stratocaster-style design. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, and is bolted onto the body, with a visible rectangular neck plate on the back. The headstock is a classic six-in-line tuner configuration, angled slightly and finished in the same light wood as the neck. The back of the guitar is solid blue with a white rectangular cover plate, and the sides reveal the instrument's moderate thickness. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, suitable for both performance and display in urban environments.
description: A blue, double-cutaway electric guitar with a white pickguard, three pickups, and a maple neck with a six-in-line headstock. The design is sleek and modern, with black control knobs and a contoured body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue body, white pickguard, three pickups, three black control knobs, and the full maple neck with six-in-line headstock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's slim profile, the thickness of the body, and the protruding control knobs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid blue back, white rectangular neck plate, and the back of the maple neck and headstock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the guitar's thickness and the side contour of the body and neck.
attribute_headstock_design: Six-in-line tuners, light wood, no visible logo, classic Stratocaster contour
